items.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
items.summary: Under the agreement, the key Strait of Hormuz waterway will be reopened, US President Donald Trump said.

items.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
items.summary: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been found guilty of two counts of rape and given four years in jail.

items.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
items.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 3月才險勝當選！日本茨城縣下妻市長深夜失蹤 警於排水溝尋獲遺體
items.summary: 日本茨城縣下妻市67歲市長須藤豐次14日深夜被通報失蹤，警方今（15日）凌晨0時50分許尋獲遺體，疑似為想不開走上絕路，詳細情況仍在調查中。  據《產經新聞》及《讀賣新聞》報...…

items.title: 與普廷通電 克宮稱川普表明「準備協助烏俄衝突落幕」
items.summary: 美國總統川普與俄羅斯總統普廷14日通電55分鐘。過程中川普表明，已準備好協助歷時4年多的烏俄戰爭落幕。  克里姆林宮外交政策顧問鄂夏柯夫（Yuri Ushakov）談到，川...…

items.title: 簽署協議前關鍵一步 美伊將在杜哈舉行間接會談
items.summary: 美國總統川普14日宣布已與伊朗達成停戰協議，為持續數月的衝突畫下句點。一位外交官向《法新社》透露，美國和伊朗本週將在卡達首都杜哈舉行間接會談，為正式簽署旨在結束中東戰爭的協議做...…
